last_changelog_version.description: Version from the most recent ## [X.Y.Z] heading in docs/CHANGELOG.md

last_changelog_date.description: Date from the most recent changelog heading (YYYY-MM-DD)

version_already_bumped.description: True if current_version in package.json differs from last_changelog_version — indicates a partial run where package.json was bumped but the changelog/commit step did not complete

has_update_context.description: True if an update skill result is available in conversation context

category.description: Changelog group this item belongs to
